title: Bridge Essay: Personality assessment with Temperament and Character Inventory in Parkinson's disease.
concept: Self-transcendence — mystical experience, cosmic consciousness, awe, numinous in neuroscience.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Visionary Cosmologies** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Self-transcendence — mystical experience, cosmic consciousness, awe, numinous in neuroscience.

**Personality assessment with Temperament and Character Inventory in Parkinson's disease.** - Parkinsonism Relat Disord (2022). DOI: 10.1016/j.parkreldis.2022.08.004. PMID: 36030666. INTRODUCTION: There is a growing interest in personality evaluation in Parkinson's disease (PD), following observations of specific temperaments in PD patients. Therefore, our objective was to evaluate personality dimensions from the Temperament and Character Inventory (TCI) in a cohort of fluctuating PD patients considered for deep brain stimulation.
